name: TCIL_AssignTransmitter
title: TCIL_AssignTransmitter
syntax: long TCIL_AssignTransmitter(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source, dword elementNumberSource) // form 1
description: The functions sends an Assign Transmitter message to the setpoint value source device.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI and the element number specify the setpoint value user.
